body.summary: SideQuestHQ full build pushed to GitHub
what_changed: Home feed: Scout greeting, stat cards (sticky row), reminder cards
Swipeable cards: snooze (left) / complete (right) with collapse animations
Audio system: pre-cached MiMo TTS clips, interrupt system, race condition fix for dual-audio bug
Menu cards: Tinder-style card stack, zoom-in select animation, dual lurking cards
All workspace components: Reminders, Quests, Ledger, Paper Trail, Assets, People, Garage
API routes for all CRUD operations
known_issues: Workspace screens need aesthetic overhaul to match new menu card vibe (planned next)
Voice API timeouts intermittent (MiMo TTS cloud calls)
Supply Drop clip rotation system not yet built
5-minute monologue for Scout not yet created
body.notes: Eddie asked me to push so you can audit. The build is live on localhost:3000 with Cloudflare tunnel. Focus areas for audit: audio interrupt system (scout-audio.ts + HomeFeed.tsx), menu card animations (MenuCards.tsx + menu-cards.css), and the swipeable card component (SwipeableCard.tsx).
